_comment: Per-intrinsic data overrides. Use sparingly: only when upstream is wrong or unrendered. Two scopes: by_name overrides a single intrinsic; by_pseudocode_hash overrides every intrinsic in a cluster. Recognized fields: description, pseudocode.

_rdseed64_step.description: Stores a hardware-generated 64-bit random value at *val. Returns 1 on success, 0 if the hardware RNG had no data ready.

_rdseed32_step.description: Stores a hardware-generated 32-bit random value at *val. Returns 1 on success, 0 if the hardware RNG had no data ready.

_rdseed16_step.description: Stores a hardware-generated 16-bit random value at *val. Returns 1 on success, 0 if the hardware RNG had no data ready.

2fac8b14e711.pseudocode:
Return a vector in which each element i contains:
    (op3 & op1[i]) | (~op3 & ~op2[i])

That is, op3 selects between bits of op1[i] (where op3 has 1 bits)
and bits of ~op2[i] (where op3 has 0 bits).
